languages.text: "Под нарушением протоколов подразумевается грубое вмешательство в бортовой {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g} одного из пассажирских шаттлов Вашей Светлости с целью несанкционированного личного использования. Тем не менее, бортовые {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} некоторое время продолжали улавливать сигнал навигационного маяка шаттла. По последним данным, он пришвартовался к одному из торговых судов, направляющихся на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g}, после чего трансляция прекратилась".

traits.locale_text: "Под нарушением протоколов подразумевается грубое вмешательство в бортовой {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g} одного из пассажирских шаттлов Вашей Светлости с целью несанкционированного личного использования. Тем не менее, бортовые {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} некоторое время продолжали улавливать сигнал навигационного маяка шаттла. По последним данным, он пришвартовался к одному из торговых судов, направляющихся на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g}, после чего трансляция прекратилась".

languages.text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."
languages.original_text: "Под нарушением протоколов подразумевается грубое вмешательство в бортовой {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}когитатор{/g} одного из пассажирских шаттлов Вашей Светлости с целью несанкционированного личного использования. Тем не менее, бортовые {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуры{/g} некоторое время продолжали улавливать сигнал навигационного маяка шаттла. По последним данным, он пришвартовался к одному из торговых судов, направляющихся на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфол{/g}, после чего трансляция прекратилась".

traits.locale_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard cogitator of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard augurs continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for Footfall, after which the broadcast ceased."

"By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard cogitator of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard augurs continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard cogitator of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard augurs continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for Footfall, after which the broadcast ceased."

languages.text: 「プロトコール違反とは、貴方{mf|御方|御方}の乗客輸送船の搭載型思考装置を、許可なく個人的な使用のために大幅に改ざんすることです。しかし、搭載型予知装置は、しばらくの間、輸送船の航行標識信号を捉え続けていました。最新のデータによると、輸送船は、フットフォールに向かう商船の1つにドッキングした後に、放送が停止しました」
languages.original_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard cogitator of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard augurs continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for Footfall, after which the broadcast ceased."

traits.locale_text: 「プロトコール違反とは、貴方{mf|御方|御方}の乗客輸送船の搭載型思考装置を、許可なく個人的な使用のために大幅に改ざんすることです。しかし、搭載型予知装置は、しばらくの間、輸送船の航行標識信号を捉え続けていました。最新のデータによると、輸送船は、フットフォールに向かう商船の1つにドッキングした後に、放送が停止しました。」

languages.text: «La infracción de protocolos consiste en una manipulación evidente del {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g} de a bordo de una de las lanzaderas de mi{mf|lord|lady} para su uso personal no autorizado. Sin embargo, los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} de abordo siguieron detectando la señal de navegación de la lanzadera durante un tiempo. Los datos más recientes indican que atracó en una de las naves mercantes destinadas a {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g}, tras lo cual la transmisión se interrumpió».
languages.original_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."

traits.locale_text: «La infracción de protocolos consiste en una manipulación evidente del {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitador{/g} de a bordo de una de las lanzaderas de mi{mf|lord|lady} para su uso personal no autorizado. Sin embargo, los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} de abordo siguieron detectando la señal de navegación de la lanzadera durante un tiempo. Los datos más recientes indican que atracó en una de las naves mercantes destinadas a {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g}, tras lo cual la transmisión se interrumpió».

languages.text: "Als 'Protokollverstoß' bezeichnen wir die Manipulation eines {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitators{/g} an Bord eines Passagiershuttles Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} für unautorisierte persönliche Zwecke. Allerdings können die {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} an Bord das Navigationssignal des Shuttles noch eine Weile orten. Die aktuellen Daten lassen vermuten, dass es nach dem Abbruch der Verbindung an eines der Händlerschiffe mit Kurs auf {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} angedockt hat."
languages.original_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."

traits.locale_text: "Als 'Protokollverstoß' bezeichnen wir die Manipulation eines {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}Cogitators{/g} an Bord eines Passagiershuttles Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} für unautorisierte persönliche Zwecke. Allerdings können die {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} an Bord das Navigationssignal des Shuttles noch eine Weile orten. Die aktuellen Daten lassen vermuten, dass es nach dem Abbruch der Verbindung an eines der Händlerschiffe mit Kurs auf {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g} angedockt hat."

languages.text: « Par "infraction à tous les protocoles", j'entends qu'il a grossièrement altéré le fonctionnement du {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g} de bord d'une navette du vaisseau de Votre Seigneurie, et ce, pour son usage personnel. Toutefois, nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} sont parvenus à suivre le signal de la balise durant un certain temps. Nos dernières informations indiquent qu'il s'est amarré à un vaisseau marchand faisant route vers {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Castel{/g}. Nous avons ensuite perdu sa trace. »
languages.original_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."

traits.locale_text: « Par "infraction à tous les protocoles", j'entends qu'il a grossièrement altéré le fonctionnement du {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitateur{/g} de bord d'une navette du vaisseau de Votre Seigneurie, et ce, pour son usage personnel. Toutefois, nos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} sont parvenus à suivre le signal de la balise durant un certain temps. Nos dernières informations indiquent qu'il s'est amarré à un vaisseau marchand faisant route vers {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Castel{/g}. Nous avons ensuite perdu sa trace. »

languages.text: “所谓违反规程，是指他严重篡改了您某艘穿梭机的舰载{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}，用于未经授权的私人用途。不过，舰载{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}曾持续接收到此穿梭机的导航信标信号。最新数据显示，该穿梭机与一艘前往{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}的商船完成了对接，此后信号播发便终止了。”
languages.original_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."

traits.locale_text: “所谓违反规程，是指他严重篡改了{mf|Lordship|Ladyship}您某艘穿梭机的舰载{g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}沉思者{/g}，用于未经授权的私人用途。不过，舰载{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}曾持续接收到此穿梭机的导航信标信号。最新数据显示，该穿梭机与一艘前往{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}的商船完成了对接，此后信号播发便终止了。”

languages.text: "Protokol ihlali derken {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin yolcu mekiklerinden birinin dâhilî {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}kavramsayarını{/g}, izinsiz şekilde kişisel amaçlarla kurcalamasını kastediyoruz. Ancak gemideki {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alametler{/g}, mekiğin rotacılık parıldağı sinyalini bir süre daha almaya takip edebildi. Son veriler; {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'a{/g} giden tüccar gemilerinden birine kenetlendiğini, sonrasında ise yayının kesildiğini gösteriyor."
languages.original_text: "By breach of protocols, we mean grossly tampering with the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Cogitator}cogitator{/g} of one of Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s passenger shuttles for unauthorised personal use. However, the onboard {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} continued to pick up the shuttle's navigation beacon signal for some time. The latest data indicate that it docked with one of the merchant ships bound for {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}, after which the broadcast ceased."

Ancak gemideki {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alametler{/g}, mekiğin rotacılık parıldağı sinyalini bir süre daha almaya takip edebildi. Son veriler; {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'a{/g} giden tüccar gemilerinden birine kenetlendiğini, sonrasında ise yayının kesildiğini gösteriyor."
